user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter comp off requests by period, status, employee class and department, so that I can locate the requests I need to act on
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Comp Off Request screen; When I set the period, status, employee class or department and click Search; Then only matching comp off requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter comp off requests by status such as Pending with me, Approved, Rejected or Cancelled, so that I can prioritise pending approvals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Comp Off Request screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only requests awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign a comp off to an employee, so that I can grant compensatory time on their behalf
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Comp Off Request screen; When I click Assign comp off and complete the request; Then a new comp off record is created and appears in the list

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see comp off date, days, employee details and status in the list, so that I can review each request at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given comp off requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for employee code, employee name, employee class, department, comp off date, comp off days and status are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve or reject a comp off request via the Task column, so that employees receive a decision on their comp off
acceptance_criteria: Given a comp off request is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the request status changes to Approved or Rejected

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle active and inactive employees and refresh the list, so that I keep the request view current and relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Comp Off Request screen; When I switch between Active and Inactive employees and click Refresh; Then the list updates to the selected group
